title: stevia scabrella
intro: Stevia scabrella is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and closely related to the more commonly known Stevia rebaudiana. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stevia scabrella include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments, including gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Stevia scabrella can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
